raw: Library ID: 14227 This pass admits up to 4 people at half off the regular admission price. This coupon allows 50% off admission to the New England Aquarium and only applies to adult and child pricing (children under 3 are admitted free). Valid only for Aquarium admission. This coupon does not provide any other discounts and cannot be applied to combo tickets. This pass is an e-voucher that does not need to be picked up at or returned to the library . This is not a ticket. This pass is restricted to the date for which the pass is reserved . If the museum is closed due to inclement weather, passes will be honored up to 7 days after that date. Please print out the pass in the General Admission line at the Aquarium's ticket booth . Please visit neaq.org/coupons for details. Review the Aquarium’s website at www.neaq.org/safety ahead of your visit to ensure a safe and accessible experience. Library coupons or tickets obtained with library coupons may not be sold. Void if altered or copied. No cash value. Hours of operation are subject to change. This pass is funded by the Friends of the Stoneham Library.
